CreateBlbUdpListener.backendPort: Backend server listening port, integer between 1-65535
CreateBlbUdpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) / "WeightLeastConn" (weighted least connections) / "Hash" (source IP hash)
CreateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckType: Health check protocol type, supports "UDP" / "ICMP", default "UDP"
CreateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckPort: Health check port, specified when protocol is "UDP", defaults to backendPort
CreateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckString: Request string sent during health check; backend server must respond. Supports hex \00-\FF and standard ASCII, max length 1299. Required when protocol is "UDP"
CreateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default 3, integer between 1-60
CreateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval in seconds, default 3, integer between 1-10
CreateBlbUdpListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive failed health checks before the backend server is blocked, default 3, integer between 2-5
CreateBlbUdpListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive successful health checks before the backend server is restored to available, default 3, integer between 2-5
CreateBlbUdpListener.udpSessionTimeout: UDP session timeout in seconds, default 90, integer between 5-4000
